name: Substack
philosophy: Writer-first warmth — cream canvas, slab-serif Spectral display, signature orange Subscribe CTA, 17-18px reading-first body. Small-press literary magazine that grew up.

design_language.motion_signature: 180ms ease-out hover; signature Subscribe button orange glow when entering viewport; 300ms ease slide-in new-post notifications.

trademark_signals: Substack Orange (#ff6719) — most-recognized Subscribe button color on writer-platform internet
Slab-serif display (Spectral) — literary cadence, distinguishes from Medium's geometric sans
17-18px body reading size — accessible reading-first commitment
Subscriber count displayed openly — social proof as content
Writer-customizable masthead colors and fonts — platform bends to writer's brand
ai_slop_avoided: Don't render a dark-mode hero on marketing
